mapper.select: SELECT movie.id AS id, COALESCE(NULLIF(re_release.display_name_override, ''), movie.name) AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(re_release.poster_override, ''), movie.cover) AS cover, level.name AS levelName, movie.start_date AS startDate, TRUE AS isReRelease, re_release.id AS reReleaseId, re_release.version_info AS reReleaseVersionInfo, presale.id AS presaleId, (presale.id IS NOT NULL) AS hasPresaleTicket, (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM presale_specification ps WHERE ps.presale_id = presale.id AND (COALESCE(ps.bonus_title, '') != '' OR ps.bonus_included = true) )) AS hasBonus FROM re_release LEFT JOIN movie ON re_release.movie_id = movie.id AND movie.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN level ON movie.level_id = level.id -- 必须存在未开始且公开的排片场次，才算“正在上映” LEFT JOIN movie_show_time mst ON mst.re_release_id = re_release.id AND mst.deleted = 0 AND mst.open = TRUE AND mst.start_time::timestamp >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP LEFT JOIN presale ON presale.movie_id = movie.id AND presale.deleted = 0 WHERE re_release.deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(re_release.status, 1) = 1 -- 只要存在未开始且公开的排片场次，就在“正在上映”里可见（不再依赖 start_date/end_date 门槛） AND mst.id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY movie.id, re_release.id, level.name, presale.id

SELECT movie.id AS id, COALESCE(NULLIF(re_release.display_name_override, ''), movie.name) AS name, COALESCE(NULLIF(re_release.poster_override, ''), movie.cover) AS cover, TO_CHAR(re_release.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, COALESCE(re_release.time_override, movie.time) AS time, movie.original_name AS originalName, movie.description AS description, movie.level_id AS levelId, movie.status AS status, movie.deleted AS deleted, movie.create_time AS createTime, movie.update_time AS updateTime, level.name AS levelName, COUNT(DISTINCT mst.id) AS presaleShowTimeCount, MIN(mst.start_time::timestamp) AS earliestShowTime, presale.id AS presaleId, (presale.id IS NOT NULL) AS hasPresaleTicket, (EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM presale_specification ps WHERE ps.presale_id = presale.id AND (COALESCE(ps.bonus_title, '') != '' OR ps.bonus_included = true) )) AS hasBonus, TRUE AS isReRelease, re_release.id AS reReleaseId, re_release.version_info AS reReleaseVersionInfo FROM re_release LEFT JOIN movie ON re_release.movie_id = movie.id AND movie.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN level ON movie.level_id = level.id LEFT JOIN movie_show_time mst ON mst.re_release_id = re_release.id AND mst.deleted = 0 AND mst.open = TRUE AND mst.start_time::timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP LEFT JOIN presale ON presale.movie_id = movie.id AND presale.deleted = 0 WHERE re_release.deleted = 0 AND COALESCE(re_release.status, 1) = 1 -- start_date 在今天之后视为“即将上映” AND re_release.start_date > TO_DATE(#{today}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY movie.id, movie.name, movie.cover, re_release.start_date, movie.time, movie.original_name, movie.description, movie.level_id, movie.status, movie.deleted, movie.create_time, movie.update_time, level.name, presale.id, re_release.id, re_release.display_name_override, re_release.poster_override, re_release.time_override, re_release.version_info ORDER BY re_release.start_date ASC

SELECT re_release.id AS id, TO_CHAR(re_release.start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS startDate, CASE WHEN re_release.end_date IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(re_release.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS endDate, COALESCE(re_release.status, 1) AS status, re_release.version_info AS versionInfo, re_release.display_name_override AS displayNameOverride, re_release.poster_override AS posterOverride, re_release.time_override AS timeOverride FROM re_release WHERE re_release.deleted = 0 AND re_release.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY re_release.start_date DESC, re_release.id DESC
